about.title: Who am I
about.text: I provide digital solutions for your business: websites, apps, SEO, digital marketing and more with focus on your needs. Worked in various IT companies, possessing advanced development knowledge. In case you have any questions or need a digital solution (for example a website), don't hesitate to contact me.
